get.summary: Verify email address (for email links without /auth prefix)

get.description: Get the authenticated user's profile information. Password field is excluded from response.

patch.description: Update the authenticated user's profile information. User will be re-indexed in search if FEATURE_SEARCH_ENABLED=true and FEATURE_JOBS_ENABLED=true.
Upload a profile photo. **Requires FEATURE_OBJECT_STORAGE_ENABLED=true**. When disabled, this endpoint will return an error. Only image files are accepted.

400.description: No file provided or file is not an image

post.description: Create a new role. Roles can be organization-scoped (provide organizationId) or system-wide (omit organizationId). Requires "role:create" permission.

409.description: Role with this name already exists

get.description: Get a list of all roles. Optionally filter by organizationId. Requires "role:read" permission.
Get detailed information about a specific role including assigned permissions. Requires "role:read" permission.

put.description: Update role name or description. Cannot update system roles. Requires "role:update" permission.

409.description: Role with this name already exists

delete.description: Delete a role. System roles cannot be deleted. Requires "role:delete" permission.

post.description: Assign one or more permissions to a role. This replaces any existing permissions. Requires "role:manage" permission.

get.description: Get a list of all available permissions in the system. Requires "permission:read" permission.

post.description: Create a new permission. Permission name must be unique and follow the format: resource:action or resource:action:scope. Requires "permission:create" permission.

409.description: Permission with this name or resource+action already exists

post.description: Register a new user account. Password must be at least 8 characters. User will be indexed in search if FEATURE_SEARCH_ENABLED=true and FEATURE_JOBS_ENABLED=true.

201.description: User and organisation created successfully. Returns the created user, organisation, and auth tokens.

400.description: Validation error — check required fields (email, password, name, orgName)

409.description: An account with this email already exists

429.description: Too many requests — rate limited (5 per minute)

post.description: Authenticate user and receive access and refresh tokens. Access tokens expire in 15 minutes, refresh tokens in 7 days.

200.description: Login successful. accessToken expires in 15 minutes; use refreshToken to obtain a new one.

429.description: Too many requests — rate limited (10 per minute)

post.description: Obtain a new access token using a valid refresh token. Refresh tokens are valid for 7 days by default.
Verify email address using verification token. Requires FEATURE_MAIL_ENABLED=true and FEATURE_EMAIL_VERIFICATION_ENABLED=true

get.description: Verify email address via GET request (typically used in email links). Requires FEATURE_MAIL_ENABLED=true and FEATURE_EMAIL_VERIFICATION_ENABLED=true
get.summary: Verify email address (GET - for email links)

post.description: Resend email verification link. Requires FEATURE_MAIL_ENABLED=true and FEATURE_EMAIL_VERIFICATION_ENABLED=true

400.description: Email already verified or invalid email

post.description: Request a password reset email. Requires FEATURE_MAIL_ENABLED=true

200.description: If the email exists, a password reset link has been sent

example.message: If the email exists, a password reset link has been sent

post.description: Reset password using reset token from email. Requires FEATURE_MAIL_ENABLED=true
Validate invite token, set password, and activate the user account. Returns tokens.
Create a new organization. Requires "organization:create" permission. The slug must be unique and contain only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens.

409.description: Organization with this slug already exists

get.description: Get a list of all active organizations. Requires "organization:read" permission.
Get detailed information about a specific organization including members and roles. Requires "organization:read" permission.

delete.description: Soft delete an organization (sets isActive=false). Requires "organization:delete" permission.

post.description: Add a user as a member of the organization. Optionally assign a role. Requires "organization:manage" permission.

409.description: User is already a member of this organization

get.description: Get a list of all members of an organization with their roles. Requires "organization:read" permission.

put.description: Update the role assigned to an organization member. Set roleId to null to remove role. Requires "organization:manage" permission.

delete.description: Remove a user from an organization. Requires "organization:manage" permission.

post.description: The full key is returned ONCE and cannot be retrieved again. Store it securely.

201.description: API key created — key field returned once

200.description: List of API keys (full key never included)

get.summary: List API keys for the current organisation
List audit logs for the current organisation
Get a single audit log entry

get.description: Get a paginated list of tasks for the authenticated user. Supports filtering by status and search query. Search uses Meilisearch if FEATURE_SEARCH_ENABLED=true, otherwise falls back to database search.

post.description: Create a new task. The task will be indexed in search if FEATURE_SEARCH_ENABLED=true and FEATURE_JOBS_ENABLED=true.

get.description: Get detailed information about a specific task. Users can only access their own tasks.

404.description: Task not found or access denied

patch.description: Update task details. Status transitions must follow: OPEN -> IN_PROGRESS -> DONE. Task will be re-indexed if FEATURE_SEARCH_ENABLED=true and FEATURE_JOBS_ENABLED=true.

400.description: Invalid input data or invalid status transition

404.description: Task not found or access denied

delete.description: Delete a task. Task will be removed from search index if FEATURE_SEARCH_ENABLED=true and FEATURE_JOBS_ENABLED=true.

404.description: Task not found or access denied

503.description: The Health Check is not successful

post.description: Upload a file to object storage. **Requires FEATURE_OBJECT_STORAGE_ENABLED=true**. When disabled, this endpoint will return an error.

400.description: No file provided or invalid file

get.description: Generate a time-limited signed URL for accessing a private file. **Requires FEATURE_OBJECT_STORAGE_ENABLED=true**.

403.description: Access denied - user does not own this file

get.summary: Get signed URL for private file

delete.description: Delete a file from object storage. **Requires FEATURE_OBJECT_STORAGE_ENABLED=true**.

403.description: Access denied - user does not own this file

get.description: Search tasks by query string. **Requires FEATURE_SEARCH_ENABLED=true**. When disabled, falls back to database search. Search is scoped to the authenticated user's tasks.
Search users by query string. **Requires FEATURE_SEARCH_ENABLED=true**. When disabled, returns empty results. Requires "user:read" permission.
Search across both tasks and users. **Requires FEATURE_SEARCH_ENABLED=true**. When disabled, falls back to database search for tasks and returns empty results for users.
get.summary: Global search (tasks and users) using Meilisearch
List all farms for the current organisation

Forbidden — workers can only delete their own records

List all units for a farm

Forbidden — workers can only delete their own records

info.title: AquaFarm API
info.description:
Production-ready NestJS backend boilerplate API documentation.
    
**Feature Status:**
- Background jobs disabled
- Email service disabled
- Object storage disabled
- Search service disabled

**Feature Toggles:**
All features are controlled via environment variables:
- FEATURE_REDIS_ENABLED
- FEATURE_JOBS_ENABLED
- FEATURE_MAIL_ENABLED
- FEATURE_EMAIL_VERIFICATION_ENABLED
- FEATURE_OBJECT_STORAGE_ENABLED
- FEATURE_SEARCH_ENABLED

Set these to "true" or "false" to enable/disable features.

bio.example: Software engineer passionate about NestJS and TypeScript

profilePhoto.description: Profile photo URL or S3 key

name.description: Role name (must be unique within organization or globally if organizationId is null)

description.example: Can edit content and manage tasks

organizationId.description: Organization ID for organization-scoped roles. Omit for system-wide roles.

name.description: Role name (must be unique within organization)

permissionIds.description: Array of permission UUIDs to assign to the role

refreshToken.description: Refresh token received from login or register

token.description: Email verification token sent to user email

email.description: User email address to send password reset link

token.description: Password reset token received via email
Invite token from the invitation email

slug.description: Organization slug (unique identifier, lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only)

description.example: A leading technology company specializing in innovative solutions

ownerId.description: Owner user ID (will be added as organization member with admin role)

logo.description: Organization logo URL or S3 key

userId.description: User ID to add as member

roleId.description: Role ID to assign to member (optional, can be assigned later)

whatsappMinRole.description: Minimum role required to use WhatsApp integration

telegramMinRole.description: Minimum role required to use Telegram integration

scopes.description: Permissions this key will be granted

expiresAt.description: Expiry date — null means no expiry

description.example: Write comprehensive documentation for the NestJS project including API endpoints and setup instructions

notes.example: Located near the Volta estuary, prone to seasonal flooding.
Located near the Volta estuary, prone to seasonal flooding.
